title: Priests and Warriors Collide
description: The Shandia attack Upper Yard, revealing that Skypiea’s conflict is bigger than the Straw Hats and tied to stolen land.
scene: Across pages 15, 16, 17, 18, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, Wyper, Luffy, Nami. The Shandia attack Upper Yard, revealing that Skypiea’s conflict is bigger than the Straw Hats and tied to stolen land.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: This is different from a simple punch.....

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: That bastard...what the hell is going on...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: HOH!! HOHO.........!! My name is Sator!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Aah!! The boat is moving by itself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Of course, these surprise clouds and I

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Will not allow you to succeed...

summary: The Shandia attack Upper Yard, revealing that Skypiea’s conflict is bigger than the Straw Hats and tied to stolen land.
